author: Ameen Hassan
summary: An automated scheduled task 'ideas-workspace-weekly-sync' ran for the week of 2026-05-18. The task attempted to locate the IDeaS_Workspace directory on the Desktop but it was not found. Sprint week was calculated as Week 15 starting May 12. A scan of Downloads for IDeaS files returned no results. A Desktop listing tool call failed due to a permission stream error. The sync task could not complete due to the missing workspace directory.
problems: Tool permission request failed for listing Desktop contents (stream closed before response received)
approaches: Calculated current sprint week using Python date arithmetic (Week 15, May-12)
Searched ~/Downloads/ with find for IDeaS files
Attempted to list ~/Desktop/ contents to locate workspace
results: IDeaS_Workspace not present at expected Desktop path
Current sprint is Week 15, folder name: Week-15_May-12
No IDeaS files found in Downloads
Desktop listing failed due to permission error — workspace location unknown
open_questions: Where is the IDeaS_Workspace directory located if not on the Desktop?
Was the IDeaS_Workspace ever created or has it been moved/renamed?
Should the scheduled task path be updated to reflect the correct workspace location?
